Templates for issues and GitHub Actions workflows for CI/CD and project management.

## Folders
- **[ISSUE_TEMPLATE](ISSUE_TEMPLATE/README.md)**: Templates for bug reports, feature requests, and RFCs with specific fields and sections.
- **[workflows](workflows/README.md)**: GitHub Actions workflows for building, testing, compliance checks, translation management, and stale PR handling.
